$readme: SYNTHETIC tax profile (issue #39 golden-snapshot fixture) — the HIGH-standard-deduction variant.
Identical to tax-profile-low-deduction.json in EVERY field except standardDeductionByYear (single/2025 = 30000 here, vs 15000 there).
That single changed value is the whole point: with the fixture's fixed 22000 itemized total, 22000 < 30000 so the verdict flips to 'standard'.
Because nothing else differs, the flip PROVES the itemize-vs-standard recommendation reads the configured standard deduction rather than any hardcoded number (M2-2 coverage).
